title: HOME MINISTER HOVIN HPC-D (LF) RAWN HAW DAN TUR RUAHMAN
content:
104/2025-2026

Aizawl, 9th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga hovin a pisa-ah HPC-D (LF) “Lalhmingthang’s Faction” te rawn haw dan tur ngaihtuahho a ni a, he hunah hian DGP, Home Secretary bakah PHQ, GAD, Law & Judicial, Finance, DIPR, Aizawl bawrhsap bakah Home department leh PHQ hotute an tel a, Sakawrdai SDO (Civil) a tel bawk a ni.

Ruahman lawk dan chuan April ni 14, 2026 hian Sakawrdaiah Mizoram sawrkar leh HPC-D (LF) te hian inremna thuthlung “Memorandum of Settlement” an ziak ang a, a tuk April ni 15, 2026 ah Mizoram sawrkarin an awm lailawkna tur a ruahmanah an insawn ang. April ni 30, 2026-ah CTI-Sesawngah silai tungin an ralthuamte an surrender bawk ang.

Vawiin meeting hian HPC-D (LF) te’n silai an tun dan tur leh hemi in a kaihhnawih ruahmanna chi hrang hrang chipchiar takin an sawiho a ni.

Attachment

title: IRRIGATION MINISTER-IN MINISTER OF STATE FOR JAL SHAKTI KAWM
content:
103/2026-2027

Aizawl, 9th April, 2026 :Tukin khan Mizoram tlawha cham mek Raj Bhushan Choudhary Minister of State for Jal Shakti, Department of Water Resources, River Development and Ganga Rejuvenation chu Pu PC Vanlalruata, Minister Irrigation and Water Resources Department, Mizoram chuan Lok Bhavan (Governor chenna) ah a hmu a, Mizoram tana thil pawimawh tak takte leh mamawhte a lo thlen a ni.

He an inkawmnaah hian Minister Pu Ruata chuan Mizoram hian ruahtui dawngtha viau mah ila a dah khawlnate kan neih that loh avang leh tlangram chhengchhe tak kan nih avanga tuia harsatna kan tawh dante sawifiah a, tui dah khawlna tha zawk, tuikhuahte hmanga irrigation project kan neih theihna tura hma lakpui turin Union Minister hi a ngen a ni.

Pu Ruata hian Mizoramin leihnuai tui verh chhuah hmanga (Irrigation) kan hlawkpui zia sawiin, he project hi tih tawp tumna a awmnia a hriat thu sawiin, chhunzawm leh a nih theihna turin a ngen bawk a ni. Tlangram kan nih avang a loneitute hnena tui pekna tur Rate (Cost Per Hectare) chu keini ang tlangram tan chuan a beitham avangin a bik taka North East-te tan ennawn sak leh turin a ngen bawk.

Mizoram Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoman Union Minister hnena lehkha a lo ziah tawh Mat Valley Integrated Project, Rs 274.25 Crores, Irrigation and Water Resources Departmentin DPR a siam, Bramaputra Board a thawn thlak tawh chu enzui sak a a rangthei ang ber sanction turin a ngen bawk. Solar pump leh PMKUSUM hmanga tlangram tui pekna rate hniam bik te pawh tih san turin a thlen bawk.

Mizoram leh tlangram dangte nena hman tangkai tur National Hill Water Security Mission-din a tlangramte tuia harsatna sut kian dan tur ngaihtuah sak turin Union Minister hi a ngen bawk a, inkawmna hun tha tak neiin Union Minister pawh hian  Delhi-ah Secretary-te lo sawipui a tum thu in a chhang a, hun rem changah Mizoram lama a enkawltu Department te nen chiangkuang zawk sawihona hun ruahman a tum thu a lo hrilh bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHCHIP-AH ‘KISAN MELA & EXHIBITION 2026’ NEIH A NI
content:
102/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 9th April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip Bazar Rooftop-ah Agricultural Technology Management Agency (ATMA) bultumin, ni hnih awh tur ‘Kisan Mela & Exhibition - 2026’ hawnna hun buatsaih a ni. Hawnna inkhawm hi ATMA Project Director Pi Lalchhuansangi’n a kaihruai a, Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma’n khuallian niin Mela hi a hawng a ni.

Khuallian Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Kisan Mela neih a nih theih nana ATMA hmalakna chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, he huna kalkhawm loneitute chu tunlai thiamna (modern technology) hmang tangkai deuh deuh tur leh mi thiamte rawn nachangte hria a, an zir chianna atanga thil tha zawk an sawite chu thuawih taka zawm thin turin a chah a. Agriculture chu mihring nunphung (quality of life) innghahna lungphum pawimawh em em, mimal leh khawtlang hriselna innghahna bulpui a nih thu sawiin, loneitute chuan thlai hrisel tak an thar theih nan rilru dik tak pua an hnate thawk thin tura chahin, he Kisan Mela hi lo hlawkpui theuh turin duhsakna a hlan a. He hun hmanga kalkhawm department hrang hrang hotute leh khawtlang hruaitute pawh, thawh hona tha tak nei zel tur leh mahni hma chauh sial mai lova, mipuite leh mamawhtu apiangte tana thahnemngai taka thawk thin turin a fuih bawk.

Kisan Mela-ah hian Department hrang hrang 8 - Agriculture, Horticulture, Fisheries, Sericulture, AH & Vety, LRS & WC (Soil), KVK leh ATMA-te bakah entrepreneurs-te tan stall 24 zet siam a ni a. Hmasawnna thar an neihte leh thil siam leh thar chhuah chi hrang hrangte pho chhuah niin, a thlawna inentirna ‘Animal Health Clinic’ leh ‘Plant Health Clinic’ te buatsaih a ni bawk. FPO leh MzSRLM hnuaia SHG hrang hrangte bakah agri-input dealers-te an tel tha hle a, hei hian ATMA thil tum ber ‘Research-Extension-Farmer’ inthlunzawmna ti chakin, loneitu leh entrepreneur-te tan thiamna thar leh eizawnna kawng thar a hawn belh zel beisei a ni.

Vawiina Kisan Mela hawnna inkhawmah hian District Agriculture Officer Pu Lalchharlian’n Serchhip District-a loneitu thawk tha leh buh thar tamte hnenah Farmers Award a hlan a. Khaw Intodelh berah Piler khua thlan niin lawmman hlan nghal an ni bawk.

FARMERS AWARD LATUTE:

• Leilet Buh Tharah: 1st- Chawnsanga, Lungpho (34.74 Qtls); 2nd- Lalrotluanga, Khawlailung (34.2 Qtls); 3rd- Chawngthanpuia, Thenzawl (32.4Qtls).

• Tlangram Buh Tharah: 1st- Lalthazuala, Piler (29.4 Qtls); 2nd- Zoramchhana, (27.93 Qtls); 3rd- Zopektluanga,Hualtu (23.1 Qtls)

• Buha Khaw Intodelh Ber: Piler khua.

Kisan Mela hian naktuk, April ni 10, 2026 thleng a awh dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah Green-Ag Project 9th Technical Meeting neih a ni
content:
101/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 9th of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Green-Ag project 9th Technical Support Group (TSG) meeting chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hovin hman a ni a, he meeting-ah hian Mamit District-a Agriculture leh a kaihhnawih Department hrang hrang te an tel a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Sawrkar Department hrang hrangte inlungrual taka thawhhona a pawimawhzia sawiin, Green-Ag project huam chhung khuaah te chuan thawhhona awmze nei taka awm ngei a beisei tih a sawi a.

Kum 2026-27 chhunga Mamit District a Green-Ag hmalakna tur hrang hrang te sawi ho a ni a. He project a hmalakna hrang hrang ; Green Landscape Management Plan (GLMP) kalpui dan tur te, department hrang hrang te nena thawh ho dan tur (convergence) te leh Annual Work plan leh budget te sawi ho a ni bawk.

Dr Keny Vanlalhriatpuia, State Technical Co-ordinator chuan he project hnuaia hmalak dan hrang hrang report tawi a pe a. Dr. Vanlalchhandama, Team Leader in-charge chuan kum hmasa lama hmalakna hrang hrang te sawiin, kum 2026-27 a hmachhawp te a tlangzarh bawk. Budget sawihona neih niin, Department aiawh kalkhawm te nen thawhho dan tur te sawi ho a ni.

Green-Ag project hi Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO) Global Environment Facility (GEF) funding niin, kum 2019 khan Mizoram-ah bul tan a ni a, Mamit leh Lunglei district ah kalpui niin Dampa Tiger Reserve leh Thorangtlang wildlife sanctuary bul hnai a khaw 38 te a huam a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Line Department te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA'N MIZO KHAWBUNGAH HLAKUNGPUI MUAL THAWHRUKNA LEH RUBY JUBILEE HMANPUI
content:
100/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 9th April 2026:Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister of State chuan vawiin khan Mizo Hlakungpui Mual thawh rukna leh Ruby Jubilee chu Khuallian niin a hmanpui a, hemi rual hian hla phuahthiam mi pahnih leh thuziakmi pali chawimawina lungphun a hawng nghal a ni. He hunah hian East Tuipui bialtu MLA Pu Ramthanmawia chu khual zahawm a ni.

Prof. Lalnilawma chuan thu sawiin, Mizo Hlakungpui Mual buatsaih a nih theihna tura ngaihtuahna sengtute fakawm a tih thu sawiin mi nazawng tih theih a nih loh thu a sawi a, Mizo Hlakungpui Muala seng luh thar mi 6 te chu a lawmpui thu leh zahna chibai a buk thu a sawi a, mi hlawhtlingte lawmpui a, chawimawi tlakte chawimawi zel turin kalkhawm mipuite a sawm a ni.

Khuallian chuan Mizo hlakungpui mual hi hmun hrang hranga Mizo awmte min phuarkhawmtu ni se a duh thu a sawi a, Hlakungpui mual atang hian Mizo te harh thar a, zirna ngaisang thar tur leh thalaite'n tlawmngaihna leh hawihhawmna nun vawng nung turin a chah a, Mizo Hlakungpui Mual hi Mizote hlut a nih zel a, Mizo History zir a nih apianga thai lan a nih zel theihna turin a duhsak thu a sawi a, lawmpuina Cheng sing nga (₹50,000) a hlan nghal a ni.

Khual zahawm Pu Ramthanmawia chuan Mizoram hmun hrang hrang atanga pankhawm a nih hian Mizo Hlakungpui Mual hlutna a lantir thu a sawi a, sum leh thil hlu danga lei theih loh a nih thu pawh sawiin thangthar lo kal leh zel turah pawh a hlutna a pun deuh deuh a beisei thu a sawi a. Mizote tana hmun pawimawh tak buatsaihtu Committee te leh Khawbung khua te chungah lawmthu a sawi a, Mizo Hlakungpui mual din alo nih dan hrang hrang tarlangin, kum 40 lai a lo tling ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Mizo Hlakungpui Mualah hman niin Pu C. Lalluia, Chairman, Mizo Hlakungpui Mual Committee chuan a kaihruai a, Rev. Dr. C. Rosiama, Mission Veng Aizawl chuan hunserh hmangin Khawbung Branch YMA zaipawl an zai a, Secretary te hnen atangin report ngaihthlak niin Pi Lalchhandami Pachuau, BDO Khawbung bakah sengluh thar chhungte leh sengluh tawh chhungte atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni a, anni bakah hian Pu B. Lalthangliana, Chairman, Selection Committee leh Pu H. Lalniliana, VCP leh Vice Chairman Mizo Hlakungpui Mual Committee te'n thu an sawi bawk. Zanah Mizo Hlakungpui Mual kum 40-na pualin Concert buatsaih a ni bawk.

Mizo hlakungpui mual thawhruknaah hian hla phuahtu pahnih - Pu Hawva (1893-1956) leh Pu Lalmama (1901-1959) te bakah thu ziaktu pali - Capt. LZ Sailo (1924-2008), Pi Kawlkungi (1927-2015), Rev. Zairema (1917-2008) leh Pu Lalhmingliana Saiawi (1937-2016) te sengluh an ni a, mi 41 sengluh an ni tawh a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HNEN ATANGA HRIATTIRNA
content:
99/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9th April 2026:Chief Secretary, Govt. of Mizoramin District tin Bawrhsap-te chu Tuialhthei leh LPG Gas- a mipuiin harsatna an tawh lohna tura Joint Control Room leh District Level Monitoring Cell din tura a tih angin, a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan hriattirna a tichhuak.

CIRCULAR

Memo No.A.48011/6/2025 (FCS)- DC (LTI): Chief Secretary, Mizoram in District tin Bawrhsap-te chu Tuialhthei leh LPG Gas a mipuiin harsatna an tawh loh nan te, chheh ruk (hoarding), man to zawk a hralh (black marketing) leh kawng diklo a lak pen anih loh nana hma la turin a hriattir a. Hemi bawhzui hian Joint Control Room leh District Level Monitoring Cell din a ni.

Mipui ten thil diklo an hriat chuan a hnuai a helpline tarlan ah hian engtiklai pawhin an zualko thei ang.

Helpline No: 9436147377 / 9862944381

Joint Control Room Members te:

1. Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai.2. Superintendent of Police P, Lawngtlai3. DCSO, Lawngtlai4. DIPRO, Lawngtlai

District Monitoring Cell:1. DCSO. Lawngtlai, Convener2. Sub- Deputy Magistrate - II, Lawngtlai.3. Inspector, Legal Metrology, Lawngtlai4. President. Consumer Association Lawngtlai

Sd/-DONNY LALRUATSANGADeputy CommissionerLawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

title: KOLASIB DC HOVIN DISTRICT SPORTS COMMITTEE AN THUKHAWM
content:
98/2026-2027

Kolasib, April 9, 2026:Vawiin khan Kolasib DC Video Conference Room-ah Kolasib District Sports Committee chu an Chairman leh Kolasib DC ni bawk, Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin an thukhawm a. Kolasib District-a infiamna (sports) hmasawn zelna atana hmalakna tur chi hrang hrangte an sawiho.

He thutkhawmnaah hian DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, infiamna chu amah ngei pawhin a tuizawng tak a nih bakah, hun kal tawhah Joint Secretary hna te pawh lo chelh tawh thin a nih avangin sports tihhmasawnna tur atan theihtawp a ngaihtuahna te a lo sen ve thin thu a sawi a. Kolasib District ah pawh Sports hmasawn nan kalphung pangngai bakah a lian tham zawka hmalakna tur ngaihtuah turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a ni. DC chuan sports leh eco-tourism kaihkawp a hmalak dan tur ruahmanna siam thiam a pawimawh hle tih a sawi bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmnaah hian agenda pali ngaihtuah ho a ni a. Chungte chu - Mizoram State Sports Council (MSSC) atanga Promotional Fund an dawn thin sem zai dan turte, Affiliation chungchangte, District Sports Committee inkaihhruaina ennawn chungchang leh Blood Donation neih chungchangte a ni.

MSSC atanga Promotional Fund, Rs. 1,75,000/- (Nuai khat, sing sarih leh sang nga) dawn chu kalkhawmten an remtih tlan danin Association hrang hrangah sem zai a ni a. Affiliation pawh kumin May thla chhunga tih nise, Affiliation fee atan Rs. 500/- nise tiin an pawm tlang a ni. Hei bakah hian inkaihhruaina dan pawh hmasawn zelna tur leh felfai zawka kalpui a nih theih nan a tul laite siamthat a ni bawk.

Vawiina District Sports Committee thutkhawmnaah hian Kolasib district chhunga Sports Discipline hrang hrang hruaitute leh an aiawhte an kalkhawm a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT WATER & SANITATION MISSION THUKHAWM
content:
97/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9th April 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) chuan DC Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm an nei a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Chairam leh District bawrhsap nibawk chuan a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Swachh Bharat Mission (Gramin) leh Jal Jeevan Mission- kaltlangin hmalakna tam tak awm mah se, a enkawl zui lamah theihtawp chhuah a tul thu a tarlang a.Neitu thinlung put a pawimawh tak zet tih sawiin, a bik takin vantlang mipuite tana siam- Water Tanky, Solar pump, Community Sanitary Complex, Compost pit, Soak pit leh Plastic Collection Centre- te enkawl leh vawnfai kawngah mipuiten hmasawn a tul hle a ni, a ti.

Bawrhsap chuan March ni 22, 2026 ah tha tak a ' World Water Day' hman a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Tui hna siam turin ramngaw humhalh a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, a humhalh kawngah theihtawp chhuah a tul hle a ti a. Renchem taka tui hman chu tihmakmawh tak a ni tiin, tui hman kawngah mipuite inrenchem zawnga khawsak thiam turin a chah a. Lawngtlai District mipuite mamawh ang tui thianghlim pek chu thil tul leh pawimawh tak a ni tiin, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm a nih tur thu sawiin, a bik takin PHED- te tha thlah lo turin a chah nghal bawk.

Er. Lalnunfela, EE, PHE leh Member Secretary - nibawk chuan DWSM hnuaia hmalak tawhna tlangpui sawizauna a nei a.JJM hnuaiah ' Jal Arpan Diwas' chu Sihtlangpuiah neih niin, Functional Household Tap Connection ( FHTC) chu In - 167 ah dahfel tawh a ni, a ti a . Jal Arpan Diwas - hi Tuikhurlui khuaah neih nibawkin, heng khuaah te hian tui lakna hmanrua leh bungruate chu 'WATSAN Committee' hnenah hlan nghal an ni a ti.

Thutkhawmah hian DWSM hmalak dan tur sawiho nghal a ni a. Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada Programme (Kar hnih chhung awh Tui Kût) tha taka hman a ni chu lawmawm an ti tlang a. Tui hna tha zawk siam tura hmalak chu tha ti tlangin, PHED leh EFCC Department - ten thawhhona tha zawk lo nei se an ti a. JJM tha taka kalpui a ni thei chu lawmawm tiin, JJM 2.O- ah thawm that ngai leh hmalak ngaihna awm ang angte uluk leh tha taka kalpui ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) Member- te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin thutkhawm a khar.

title: MISSION SHAKTI HNUAIAH ANNUAL REVIEW MEET CUM TRAINING WCD IN BUATSAIH
content:
96/2026-2027

Aizawl, 09.04.2026:Women & Child Development hnuaia Mission Shakti (Safety, Security & Empowerment of Women) - Hmeichhiate venhimna, humhimna leh chawikanna programme kalpui mek hnuaiah ni thum chhung awh tur Annual Review Meet cum Training chu vawiin khan I&PR Lianchhiari Run Conference Hall-ah neih a ni.

Nimin khan Director Women & Child Development Director Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte hovin District tina Officer te nen Review Meeting cum training hi neih a ni tawh a. Vawiin khan Mission Shakti hnuaia thawktu te District zawng zawng ami te nen Annual Review Meet cum Training hi neih leh niin, ni 10 thleng neih a ni ang. Kum kaltaa hnathawh dan thlir letna neih bakah hmalak zel dan tur sawiho a ni a; Hmeichhia te venhim, humhim leh chawikanna kawnga hmasawnna nei turin training hi buatsaih a ni bawk. Mission Shakti Annual Review Meet cum Training hi Pi Zonunthari, Joint Secretary, SWWCD Department in a hawng a, Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte Director WCD in a kaihruai a ni.

Hemi rual hian Poshan Pakhwada (Nutrition Fortnight),  April ni 9 atang ni 23, 2026 thleng awh tur chu Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte Director WCD in a hawng nghal a, Poshan Pakhwada hman dan tur sawifiahna te neih nghal niin, Mizoram mai nilo, India ram pumpuia hman tur a nih thu a sawi. Hemi atan hian Zoram mipui te kan theihna zawn theuh a lo tawiawm a hma lo lakpui turin Women & Child Development Department chuan a ngen a ni.

Attachment

title: AMC,2026 GENERAL ELECTION A HMAN TUR EVM TE RANDOMIZED A NI
content:
94/2026-2027

Aizawl; 9thApril, 2026:Vawiinah khan Aizawl DC Meeting Hall-ah, AMC, 2026 General Election-a general observer atana ruat 4 : i) Pu R. Lalchanhima,  Additional Secretary, Transport Dept. & District Council & Minority Affairs Dept., ii)Pi Irene Zohlimpuii, Additional Secretary, GAD, iii) Pu Lalnunhlua, Additional Sectretary, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept. leh iv) Pi Angela Zothanpui, Director, School Education Dept. te leh recognized political party 4: INC,BJP,MNF leh ZPM aiawh te telpuiin EVM randomization hi neih a ni. EVM randomization programme hi Er.Lalhriatpuia, District Election Officer leh District Municipal Election Officer, Aizawl district ni bawk chuan kaihruaiin, Municipal Returning Officer (MRO) leh Assistant Municipal Returning Officer(AMRO) te pawh kokim takin he programme-ah hian an tel.

Election thianghlim leh langtlang a awm theih nan Polling station tin a hman tur EVM te hi computer hmanga hmanga thlanchhuah/ semdarh(Randomized) thin a ni a. EVM Engineer ten EVM  an check vek hnua, AMC, 2026 General Election a tana hman tlak  ni a pawm, an thlan chhuah (Balloting Unit-359 leh Control Unit-352) te chu 1strandomization-ah AMC Ward 19-a hman tura, Reserve 25% tiamin, computer hmanga semdarh (randomized) a ni a. 2ndRandomization-ah BU leh CU inkawp tur thlanchhuah ( randomized) leh a ni a.  Tichuan Final randomization-ah Ward tin tana EVM  thlanchhuah (randomized) tawh chu Ward chhunga polling station tin theuhva semdarh leh a ni. AMC hnuaiah hian Ward 19 awmin, Local council 89 a awm a, Polling Station 264 a awm mek a ni. AMC, 2026 Generals Election-ah hian VVPAT ( Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail) erawh hman a ni dawn lo.

title: Notification regarding taking over charge of Registrar of Cooperative Societies, Nagaland
